summary: Iteration 158 — Terminal Smart Sync features fully tested. All 16 backend API tests passed (full sync, delta sync, future sync, inventory pulse). Frontend terminal loads correctly with Branch 1, sync indicators work, TerminalSales receives syncVersion prop.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GET /api/sync/pos-data (full sync) returns products, customers, inventory, branch_prices, deleted_ids, sync_time, is_delta=false
PASS: GET /api/sync/pos-data with last_sync param returns is_delta=true and fewer products than full sync
PASS: GET /api/sync/pos-data with future last_sync returns 0 products, 0 customers, 0 inventory (nothing changed)
PASS: GET /api/sync/pos-data delta includes deleted_ids array for deactivated products
PASS: GET /api/sync/inventory-pulse with branch_id returns inventory items with product_id, quantity, pulse_time
PASS: GET /api/sync/inventory-pulse without branch_id returns empty items array
PASS: GET /api/sync/inventory-pulse with future since returns 0 items
PASS: Products in full sync have 'available' field (enriched with inventory)
PASS: TerminalShell.jsx has sync indicators with data-testid: sync-indicator-syncing, sync-indicator-done, sync-indicator-error (lines 647-661)
PASS: TerminalSales useEffect re-reads IndexedDB when syncVersion changes (lines 62-71)
PASS: offlineDB.js has getProductCount, getLastSyncTime, setLastSyncTime, mergeProducts functions (lines 286-340)
PASS: syncManager.js has inventoryPulse function (lines 239-266) and startAutoSync with inventoryPulseInterval (lines 268-313)
PASS: Frontend terminal loads instantly from IndexedDB cache for returning users (loadData checks getProductCount first)
PASS: Background delta sync runs non-blocking after instant load

success_rate.frontend: 100% (terminal shell, sync indicators, search, mode toggle all verified)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing products (Rice Premium 25kg, Rice Premium 500g, Test Rice 50kg).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Terminal Smart Sync Phase 1-3 fully implemented and tested. Backend sync endpoints work correctly: /api/sync/pos-data supports full sync (no last_sync) and delta sync (with last_sync), /api/sync/inventory-pulse supports lightweight stock polling. Frontend TerminalShell instant-loads from IndexedDB cache via getProductCount() check, then runs background delta sync. Sync indicators (Syncing/Up to date/Sync failed) appear in header. TerminalSales re-reads cache when syncVersion prop changes. The TEST_Trial branches return 403 errors - use Branch 1 or Branch 2 for testing.

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints are real

tests_performed.test: GET /api/sync/pos-data delta returns fewer products than full
GET /api/sync/pos-data with future last_sync returns 0 changes
GET /api/sync/inventory-pulse with future since returns 0 items
GET /api/sync/inventory-pulse with past since returns changes
Sync works with different branch IDs
UI: Branch selection appears for admin users
UI: Search input found and works
UI: Search results show products with prices and stock
